enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a routine day in Boulder on March 11, 2016: sleeping late, visiting his mom to discuss a recent Asperger's diagnosis report, and working on his website. He mentions being high while recording, excitement about a new phone for audiobooks, and the satisfying feeling of making progress on a new section of his site.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: open about it, plans to discuss it in a dedicated video
amazed by them, feels like living in the future
energized by the momentum of working on a new page section
uneventful and low-key, brain felt fried
